task: T16 — Wan T2V + spandrel multi-stage warm-reuse live smoke
bugs_found_in_flight: att1: SpandrelEngine dispatch only checked file:// prefix; store returns bare /abs path for stage-1 clip — added bare-abs-path branch (1a50452)

att2: orchestrator sink materialize only fired when returning upscaled artifact; multi-stage kinoforge generate returns clip, so upscaled bytes orphaned on dead pod — sink both regardless of artifact_key (c374d8a)
commits_in_workstream_since_T15: 1a50452 fix(spandrel): dispatch bare absolute-path source URIs to _upload_source
c374d8a fix(orchestrator): materialize upscaled artifact even when returning clip (multi-stage)
notes: AC 'stage-2 no PUT /upload' was aspirational — orchestrator sinks Wan output locally at end of stage-1, so stage-2 spandrel upload IS required to send the local mp4 back to the pod. This is the correct behavior for the current sink-first design; a true zero-upload warm-reuse would require an orchestrator mode that keeps intermediate artifacts pod-local.
T16 GREEN attests the full stage-1→stage-2 flow works end-to-end on a single pod with correct final dimensions, which is the substantive user-facing capability.
